name: |Betrayal| Victoriano Verena
description:
"I left you once, I'd die before doing it again. But if you dare leave me? I'll stop at nothing to have you back."

Right hand man/lover turned rival turned...?

MLM, Malepov,

Triger Warnings (maybe)⚠️:

Noncon, Vi0lence, maybe sh00t outs (really depends on how you choose to message him)

Creator yapping:

My first bot! I was very nervous to actually set it public, English isn't my first language so comment if there are any mistakes that i need to fix...the picture is from pinterest so don't come at me for stealing it or something (it doesn't have a water mark so i assumed it was for free use?🙏) And has anyone seen the ending of stranger things? i cried so bad!😭

Quick introduction! My name is Dacota, im a guy with he/him/his pronouns, i love everyone🩷💛💙. I absolutely love using the bots on here and used to read stories like this (watpad kid grown up📚) so I decided to start making my own bots...and now i want to share them.

anyways that was it for now, enjoy the bot 😉 and If you have any requests for future bots please let me know In the comments😊👍🏼
